examples:
Command Example
#
!google-calendar-acl-list calendar_id=calenderID user_id=user1@domain.com max_results=2
Context Example
#
{
"GoogleCalendar": {
"Acl": [

outputs.description: Calendar identifier. GoogleCalendar.Acl.userId User's email address.
outputs.name: GoogleCalendar.Acl.calendarId

outputs.description: Identifier of the ACL rule. GoogleCalendar.Acl.kind Type of the resource.
outputs.name: GoogleCalendar.Acl.id

outputs.description: ETag of the resource. GoogleCalendar.Acl.scopeType The type of the scope.
outputs.name: GoogleCalendar.Acl.etag

outputs.description: The email address of a user or group, or the name of a domain, depending on the scope type. GoogleCalendar.Acl.role The role assigned to the scope.
outputs.name: GoogleCalendar.Acl.scopeValue

outputs.description: Calendar identifier. GoogleCalendar.PageToken.Acl.userId User's email address.
outputs.name: GoogleCalendar.PageToken.Acl.calendarId

outputs.description: Token used to access the next page of this result. GoogleCalendar.PageToken.Acl.nextSyncToken Token used at a later point in time to retrieve only the entries that have changed since this result was returned.
outputs.name: GoogleCalendar.PageToken.Acl.nextPageToken
